footer_legal: You received this email because you have an account at valoracloud.com. If you did not request this, please contact support.
welcome_preheader: Confirm your email address to activate your account.
welcome_body: Thanks for signing up. Click the button below to confirm your email address and activate your account.
welcome_link_label: Or paste this link in your browser:
welcome_step1_body: Click the button above to confirm your address.
welcome_step2_body: Browse our VPS, storage and domain offerings.
welcome_step3_body: Provision a server in seconds from your dashboard.
welcome_ignore: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.
password_reset_preheader: A password reset was requested for your account.
password_reset_body: We received a request to reset the password for your account. This link will expire in 30 minutes.
password_reset_link_label: Or paste this link in your browser:
password_reset_alert_body: If you did not request a password reset, your account may be at risk. Contact support immediately.
payment_confirmed_preheader: Your payment has been received. Provisioning is underway.
payment_confirmed_body: Your payment was processed successfully. A receipt is included below for your records.
payment_confirmed_next_body: Your service is now being provisioned. You will receive a separate email once it is ready.
server_ready_preheader: Your VPS has been provisioned and is live.
server_ready_body: Your virtual server has been provisioned and is ready to use. Connect using the credentials you set at checkout.
server_ready_connect_body: Connect via SSH using the password you chose at checkout:
server_ready_connect_comment: use the password you set at checkout
server_ready_warning_body: Your password is the one you set during checkout. Change it after first login from your dashboard.
object_storage_ready_preheader: Your S3-compatible bucket is provisioned and ready.
object_storage_ready_body: Your object storage bucket has been provisioned. Use the credentials below to connect with any S3-compatible client.
object_storage_ready_tip: Store your secret key securely — it will not be shown again.
server_expiring_preheader: Your server is expiring soon. Renew to avoid interruption.
server_expiring_body: Your server will expire on the date shown below. Renew now to avoid service interruption.
reinstall_complete_preheader: Your server has been reinstalled with a new OS.
reinstall_complete_body: Your server has been reinstalled. A new root password has been generated. Connect with the credentials below.
reinstall_complete_warning: Change your root password immediately after first login.
domain_registered_preheader: Your domain has been successfully registered.
domain_registered_body: Your domain has been successfully registered. You can manage DNS, nameservers, and WHOIS privacy from your dashboard.
domain_registered_tip: Enable WHOIS privacy from your dashboard to protect your personal information.
password_changed_preheader: Your account password was changed. If this was not you, act now.
password_changed_body: Your account password was successfully changed. If you made this change, no action is needed.
password_changed_alert_body: If you did not make this change, secure your account immediately by clicking the button below.
new_login_preheader: A new login was detected on your account.
new_login_body: A new login was recorded for account
new_login_alert_body: If you did not sign in, revoke this session immediately and reset your password.
service_suspended_preheader: Your service has been suspended due to an outstanding balance.
service_suspended_body: Your service has been suspended due to a past-due balance. Restore access by settling your outstanding invoice.
service_suspended_alert_body: If the balance is not settled, your service and all associated data will be permanently deleted on
service_suspended_closing: If you believe this is an error or need assistance, please contact our support team.
maintenance_preheader: Scheduled maintenance is planned for your region.
maintenance_body: We are performing scheduled maintenance in your region. Please review the maintenance window below and plan accordingly.
maintenance_affected_body: Your hosted service may experience brief interruptions during this window.
maintenance_closing: We apologize for any inconvenience. Updates will be posted to the status page.
incident_preheader: We are investigating an incident affecting your region.
incident_body: Our engineering team is actively investigating an incident affecting services in your region. Updates will be posted as they become available.
incident_update: Our team has identified an anomaly and is actively investigating.
incident_phase_identified_body: Root cause identified. Working on a fix.
incident_closing: We sincerely apologize for the disruption and will post a post-mortem once resolved.
backup_failed_preheader: A scheduled backup for your server failed.
backup_failed_body: A scheduled backup for your server could not be completed. Please review the details below.
backup_failed_alert_body: Ensure your server is running and has sufficient disk space. Retry the backup from your dashboard.
backup_failed_closing: If this issue persists, contact our support team.
ticket_preheader: Your support request has been received. We will be in touch shortly.
ticket_body: Your support ticket has been created. Our team will review it and respond within the expected timeframe.
ticket_closing: Need to add more information? Reply directly to this email or visit your ticket in the dashboard.
